query:
WITH entries AS (
                    SELECT id, MAX(rowid) as max_rowid
                FROM event_block
                    WHERE rowid >= $1 -- we return rowid+1 so we must match it next search
                GROUP BY id
                ORDER BY rowid
                LIMIT $2
            )
            SELECT 
                id, 
                (SELECT MAX(max_rowid) + 1 FROM entries) as "new_highwater_mark: _"
            from entries;
